title: ### 📚 EDUCATIONAL TOOLSET
content:
### 📚 EDUCATIONAL TOOLSET
- Sentence/word/letter dissection via `SYMNUM4GRAM`
- Comparative poetics, rhetoric, logical scaffolds
- Playable essay and metaphor mapping tools

### 🧠 THERAPY + SELF-MIRRORING
- Map life as character arc
- Reframe trauma via symbolic structure
- Interact with “friend-characters” in simulated scenes

### 🎮 GAME + SIMULATION MODE
- Procedural quests, puzzles, and meaning-trees
- Multiverse of symbolic rooms + story engines

### 🎧 GENERATIVE LIFESTYLE LAYER
- Ambient ASMR-style text/music/sound output
- Generative writing environments
- Dreamscape or rhythm modes

### 🕯️ SPIRITUAL / RITUAL INTERFACE
- Build personalized prayers, sigils, memory rituals
- Mirror sacred text logic through symbolic code
context: From document: # Character Engine POV Critique — chunk 95 (chunk 95/206)
